history.diagnosis: The policy has converged to a local optimum where it runs forward at a constant slow speed (forward_vel ~1.25) without improving speed or exploring diverse gaits, resulting in zero variance in episode length and state coverage collapse.
The policy is stuck in a deterministic, low-variance gait with constant forward speed and zero episode length variation, due to exploration collapse in the absence of termination conditions.

The policy is stuck in a local optimum with low forward velocity (~1.2) and zero variance across episodes because the linear forward reward does not incentivize breaking into higher-speed regimes and no exploration mechanism is present.

Exploration collapse: the policy is stuck in a deterministic high-speed gait that maximizes the dominant forward reward (89.4% of total) while the exploration bonus (weight 0.1) is too weak to induce behavioral variation.
